programs.title: Volcano
programs.desc: A Los Angeles emergency official takes charge when earthquakes and erupting lava ravage the city.

programs.title: Dredd
programs.desc: A futuristic law-enforcement officer is caught in a high-stakes drug war with his rookie trainee.

programs.title: Streets of Blood
programs.desc: Two New Orleans lawmen (Val Kilmer, 50 Cent) investigate the murder of an officer.

programs.title: Shark Night
programs.desc: Friends try to avoid becoming fish food as they navigate their way across a shark-infested lake.

programs.title: The Tank
programs.desc: Six people enter an isolation tank designed to mimic the long trip to Mars.
